targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at::date AS time, count(*) AS turnos FROM episodes_events WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT created_at::date AS time, sum(tokens_in) AS tokens_in, sum(tokens_out) AS tokens_out FROM episodes_events WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT job, count(*) AS corridas, count(*) FILTER (WHERE ok) AS ok, count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT ok) AS fallos, max(creado_at) AS ultima FROM cron_corridas GROUP BY job ORDER BY job
SELECT action, count(*) AS veces FROM audit_events GROUP BY action ORDER BY veces DESC LIMIT 15
